'''''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #48''' was one of many [[in-universe]] [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]] issues published shortly before the release of [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Attack of the Clones'']]. This issue was released [[March 21]], [[2002]]. In-universe, it was published on the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] 13:3:14, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="22 BBY">The [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] 13:3:14 corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref>

==Contents==
*'''NEWS''':
**[[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]]: Let's Talk
**Transport Collision Closes [[Corulag-Jatir Hyperroute]]
**Senator [[Horox Ryyder/Legends|Horox Ryyder]] Retires

*'''BUSINESS''':
**[[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]] Attacks [[Yirt-4138-Grek-12 slicer compound|Slicer Compound]]

*'''REGIONAL''':
**[[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]/[[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] Talks to Shaky Start
**Dumping Prohibited on [[PDC3141-02]]
**[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] Expansion Delayed
**Suspicious Package Closes [[Sermerian First House]]
**[[Zorba Desilijic Tiure|Zorba the Hutt]] Sentenced to 45 Years

*'''JEDI WATCH''':
**[[People's Inquest]] Demand [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Budget Reports
**[["Baby Ludi" custody case|Baby Ludi's]] Mother to Appear on [[Essence]]

*'''SPORTS''':
**[[Blob racing|Blob Racing]] Cheater Killed

*'''LIFE''':
**[[Core World Critics Association|Holo Critics]] Preemptively Bemoan Summer Season
**225-year Old Man's Secret? Time Dilation

*'''OTHER FEATURES'''
**Corrections
**Quick Poll: "What do you think of Palpatine's attempts of negotiation with the Separatists?"
